label: exam

ocr_findings.note: Mistral misread the stylized '試験にはコレが出る！' callout as 'つなが出る！'. The misread text did not leak into structured or output JSON, so no release impact.

narrative: Four question entities have JP stems and choices faithful to the OCR source. Answer indices 1, 1, 3, 2 correctly map to イ, イ, エ, ウ per OCR answer key '問題5-12 イ 問題5-13 イ 問題5-14 エ 問題5-15 ウ'. The misread callout 'つなが出る！' was correctly excluded from structured/output.
